description:
About the job

💸 Up to USD 28,000 salary on a full time, contractor contract

🌎 Fully remote working!

✨ Working with globally recognisable brands in US Entertainment

💻 Working with the latest hardware, tech stack and tools

🏋️ Access to benefits (country dependent 🌎 )




Who We Are 




At Storm Ideas, we supercharge the digital presence of some of the biggest names in US TV and entertainment. Since 2008, our international team has delivered bold, forward-thinking solutions for globally recognised clients.




Whether we're building innovative products, producing high-impact social content, or designing smarter ways for our partners to work—we’re right at the cutting edge of creativity, technology, and automation.




Embracing Future-Facing Technology 




Emerging technologies like Artificial Intelligence present exciting opportunities for us and our clients. As the world adapts, we’re committed to safely exploring the potential advantages of AI, integrating it thoughtfully into our work where possible, and one day guiding our clients through new possibilities when they’re open and ready for them. By tapping into our creativity, expertise, and collaboration, we aim to embrace its potential together. Our vision relies on people who are curious about this technology and excited to take on this challenge!




RESPONSIBILITIES 




Storm Ideas partners with some of the world's most recognisable media and entertainment brands. Behind that work are planning processes, approvals, asset handoffs, reporting needs, stakeholder reviews, and internal systems that need to run cleanly.




As a Creative Operations Officer, you will help teams turn messy creative and operational processes into clear workflows, systems, documentation, and handoffs. This is not a generic coordinator role. The focus is reliable delivery: understanding how work really moves, structuring it clearly, building practical Airtable and lightweight workflow solutions, and helping people use them.




You do not need to come from a social media background. You do need to be comfortable learning new domains quickly, asking good questions, and using tools and AI to make your work clearer, faster, and easier to hand over.




What can you expect? 

Organize and manage your own work across briefs, tasks, priorities, and follow-ups, without needing every next step spelled out.
Deliver work cleanly, independently, and on time, with clear status updates.
Map messy processes, identify bottlenecks, and turn ambiguous briefs into clear next steps.
Use AI responsibly to speed up workflow mapping, documentation, QA, data cleanup, and automation support, while checking outputs carefully.
Clean up creative approval workflows so teams know what is planned, what is waiting for review, what is approved, and who owns the next action.
Structure work into sensible fields, statuses, ownership, handoffs, review points, and definitions of done.
Build Airtable bases, views, and interfaces for client teams, with supporting documentation that makes the workflow easy to use.
Improve lightweight systems in tools such as Airtable, spreadsheets, project management platforms, documentation tools, Slack or Teams workflows, and automation platforms.
Create clear documentation, SOPs, interface notes, handover materials, and client-ready explanations.
QA your own work before handoff, checking data, logic, copy, statuses, permissions, assumptions, and user experience.
Present process improvements in clear, non-technical language to internal teams and client stakeholders.
Collaborate with creative, social, client service, analytics, and technical colleagues to ship practical improvements.
Support workflows after launch by gathering feedback, fixing friction points, and improving adoption.




QUALIFICATIONS 




What's important to us: 

Experience taking ownership of workflows, processes, systems, or operational projects and making them clearer or more reliable.
Strong structured thinking: you can break a messy problem into users, inputs, outputs, statuses, handoffs, risks, and decisions.
Practical AI use in real work, improving workflow efficiency and measuring success with KPIs.
Reliable ownership of defined projects, including asking clarifying questions, communicating progress, and escalating early when something is blocked.
Excellent written communication and documentation skills.
Confidence with spreadsheets, structured data, project tools, and documentation tools.
Strong no/low-code and systems aptitude. Airtable experience is highly useful, and this role will suit someone who enjoys turning a rough workflow into a clean working process.
High attention to detail and a habit of checking work before it reaches other people.
Comfortable explaining systems, process changes, and trade-offs to non-technical stakeholders.
Adaptability and curiosity about new tools, especially where they make delivery cleaner or faster.




What’s nice to have: 

Experience with creative, content, social, campaign, approval, or asset workflows.
Experience building Airtable bases, interfaces, automations, or similar lightweight project management workflows.
Familiarity with tools such as Asana, Monday.com, Jira, Zapier, ChatGPT/Codex, Claude/Cowork, Slack, Teams, etc.
Basic familiarity with JavaScript, HTML, APIs, or scripting concepts.
Experience with change management- helping teams adopt a new process or tool without creating unnecessary complexity.




What It’s Like to Work Here




Cutting-Edge Tools & Tech

Work with the latest hardware and software so you're always set up to succeed.




Ideas Welcome, Always

We don’t just say we’re open to ideas—we act on them. Your insights can shape how we work across the company.




Fast, Agile, Adaptive

We move like a start-up but with the backing of a larger team. Quick decisions and a responsive culture are the norm.




Incredible Team, Global Reach

Join an international crew of 175+ passionate, talented people. We hire for skill, drive, and authenticity—just be yourself.




APPLICATION




Please include a cover letter with your application. It does not need to be long, but it should give us clear evidence of how you work.




In your cover letter, please briefly cover:




one example of a messy workflow, process, or system you helped make clearer, including what changed and what improved;
your experience with Airtable or similar lightweight project/workflow tools, including what you have built or improved;
one practical example of how you use AI in your work, including how you check or apply the output.




RECRUITMENT PROCESS




First, we will review your CV and cover letter for the requested examples.




If successful, you will receive a task using a provided Airtable base. We will ask you to show how you structure the workflow, build useful views or interfaces, document your decisions, and explain your approach.




If successful, you will be invited to a 60-minute interview. During the meeting, you will walk through your completed task as if presenting to a client, followed by a Q&A with Creative Operations management.




And that’s it!

DiDi Global Inc. is the world’s leading mobility technology platform. It offers a wide range of app-based services across markets including Asia-Pacific, Latin America and Africa, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, chauffeur, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as auto solutions, food delivery, intra-city freight, and financial services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.

We strive to always create valuable experiences for our users in everything we do. Our focus is to always innovate new experiences that are safe, pleasant and efficient.

About the job

🚀 New Remote Opportunity for LATAM Talent!




Email Marketing Specialist | Full-time | $2,000–$2,500/month + PTO

📍 100% Remote · LATAM




Are you an email marketing pro who thrives on flawless execution, sharp organization, and making sure every campaign launches accurately and on time? Hiebing — an independent, integrated marketing agency with 130+ team members across Madison and Austin — is looking for an Email Marketing Specialist to own day-to-day campaign execution across a diverse portfolio of clients.




🎯 What you'll do:

Build, configure, and execute email marketing campaigns with a strong emphasis on Marketo; manage production across multiple clients — coordinating timelines, approvals, asset collection, QA, deployment, and post-launch reporting; execute audience segmentation, list imports, suppression lists, dynamic content, personalization, and A/B testing workflows; perform thorough pre-launch QA across creative, links, tracking, and automated journeys; collaborate cross-functionally with strategists, copywriters, designers, developers, and client teams; monitor performance and support reporting and optimization; and contribute to broader digital marketing operations including CMS updates, GTM implementations, and analytics projects as needed.




✅ What they're looking for:

3+ years of professional email marketing or marketing operations experience
Strong hands-on Marketo experience (required); Iterable, Mailchimp, or similar platforms are a plus
Solid understanding of email production workflows and campaign operations
Experience managing multiple client accounts in an agency, consulting, or fast-paced marketing environment
Exceptional attention to detail and passion for quality assurance
Strong organizational, time management, and prioritization skills
Experience coordinating cross-functional teams under competing priorities
Familiarity with HTML and email template troubleshooting
Strong written and verbal English communication skills




🌟 Bonus points for: Marketo nurture campaign or lifecycle marketing experience; email deliverability knowledge; CRM integration and audience management experience; GA4 and GTM familiarity; enterprise client or complex approval workflow experience; or familiarity with Iterable, Movable Ink, Klaviyo, or HubSpot.




🌟 Why apply?

This role was created to centralize email campaign execution and give Hiebing's senior digital team more capacity to focus on strategy and client leadership. You'll be a key operational partner across a multi-client portfolio — with collaborative teammates, real ownership of delivery quality, and the chance to support broader digital initiatives as you grow.




This role is placed through Talent Scout, connecting top LATAM professionals with leading U.S. brands and agencies — with full support on recruiting, compliance, and payroll.

description:
About the job

About The Company

DiDi Global Inc. is the world’s leading mobility technology platform. It offers a wide range of app-based services across markets including Asia-Pacific, Latin America and Africa, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, chauffeur, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as auto solutions, food delivery, intra-city freight, and financial services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.

For more information, please visit: www.didiglobal.com/news

About The Team/role

¿Te apasiona el crecimiento de los negocios y la tecnología? En DiDi Tu Negocio buscamos un Account Growth Executive enfocado en la aceleración y desarrollo de cuentas en su etapa inicial. Tu misión principal será actuar como el motor de crecimiento para los restaurantes que se acaban de integrar a nuestra plataforma, operando de manera estratégica, consultiva y principalmente remota.

Buscamos a un experto en éxito del cliente (Inside Sales/Costumer Success) que tome el liderazgo durante las primeras semanas de vida de los nuevos aliados. Tu objetivo será analizar a fondo su modelo de negocio, entender su máximo potencial y guiarlos para que dominen por completo el uso de la plataforma. A través de tu asesoría, asegurarás que cada nuevo restaurante traduzca su reciente registro en un despegue comercial exitoso, dejándolos encaminados, activos y listos para operar con autonomía

In this role, you'll be...


Acelerar la etapa inicial: Contactar e impulsar a los restaurantes recién integrados a la plataforma para garantizar una adopción rápida, efectiva y de alto impacto comercial en sus primeras semanas de operación.
Venta Consultiva y Diagnóstico: Analizar el perfil de cada negocio para identificar su encaje perfecto con nuestro producto, descubrir su potencial de crecimiento y entregarles planes de acción a la medida.
Educación estratégica (Know-how): Guiar y capacitar a los socios comerciales para que comprendan a fondo el valor y las herramientas de DiDi Tu Negocio, asegurando que maximicen sus ventas y dominen la plataforma.
Gestión Comercial Dinámica: Ejecutar estrategias de contacto continuo a través de canales digitales y telefónicos, optimizando cada interacción para lograr un alto volumen de cuentas activadas y rentables de manera remota.
Monitoreo y Transición: Dar seguimiento a las métricas clave de desempeño y, una vez que el restaurante alcance su nivel de madurez óptimo y adopción total, prepararlo exitosamente para su siguiente fase dentro del ecosistema de DiDi.



We're eager to be in touch because you have...


Experiencia: 2 a 3 años en Customer Success (con enfoque comercial), Inside Sales o Account Management (Tech, Delivery o SaaS).
Mentalidad Ganadora: Alta motivación por cumplir y sobrepasar constantemente tus metas comerciales.
Perfil Consultivo: Habilidad para diagnosticar negocios, resolver objeciones y proponer soluciones basadas en datos.
Comunicación: Gran capacidad para conectar y persuadir a dueños y gerentes de restaurantes.
Idiomas: Inglés intermedio.
Herramientas: Manejo de CRM (Salesforce o similares) y dominio de Excel / G-Suite.



You'll love working at DiDi because...

We create user value

We strive to always create valuable experiences for our users in everything we do. Our focus is to always innovate new experiences that are safe, pleasant and efficient.

We are data-driven

We are strong believers in making informed decisions, that’s why we are data-driven. We can better navigate the business landscape strategically by analyzing valuable metrics.

Win-win Collaboration

Success is a team sport. When we work to help our partners and colleagues win, we win, too. While keeping everyone's best interest at heart, we communicate with candor and execute with excellence in all we do.

We believe in integrity

Integrity is at the very core of our business. We are people who always want to do the right thing. Our intentions are sincere, we speak our minds and listen to each other.

Growth

We always strive to do better. That means venturing beyond our comfort zones, learning from our mistakes, and helping each other grow.

Diversity and Inclusion

Diversity is one of our biggest strengths. Our differences are what make us distinct. We respect each other and believe in equal opportunities for all.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams

At DiDi, we believe that our differences are our biggest source of strength. That’s why we are committed to promoting equal opportunities to all candidates and employees as an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Employment and advancement decisions at DiDi are always made based on the needs of the position and the qualifications of the candidate. We do not discriminate against any employee or applicant based on their gender, age, sexual orientation, nationality, marital status, pregnancy/maternity, disability, race, religion and beliefs, or any other status protected by applicable laws wherever we operate.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams, and a workplace that is free from discrimination and harassment, because that’s how we create better products and services, make better decisions and better serve the communities we’re a part of.

description:
About the job

The Next Level of Fire & Life Safety Leadership

With more than two centuries of combined history, brands like Kidde, Kidde Commercial, Edwards, GST, Badger, Gloria and Aritech have been leading the way in protecting people and property around the world. Now, we’re taking that leadership to the next level. Kidde Global Solutions brings together the most trusted and iconic brands in safety, building upon our shared experience and expertise to address the needs and challenges of more customers in more places. With an unmatched portfolio of solutions and services, and a commitment to constant innovation we’re elevating the standards for an entire industry – and establishing the next level of fire and life safety leadership.

At Kidde Global Solutions, you’re joining a global technology leader in fire and life safety solutions and our employees are the heart of it all. With industry-defining brands in life safety and security, you’ll be part of a legacy of leadership working with cutting-edge technologies that protect lives and property worldwide. As a leading fire safety brand, our mission is to provide solutions that protect people and property from the effects of fire and related hazards. We’re committed to expanding our impact and providing dynamic opportunities for growth within our team. You’ll be part of a company that prioritizes quality, integrity, collaboration, and customer care, with the resources, training, and incentives to ensure your success every step of the way.

Global Brand Sales Specialist

Location: Mexico - Remote

About This Role

Kidde is seeking a Brand Sales professional to support various distribution channel management activities. This role is responsible for supporting commercial leadership, product commercialization, and strategic market execution for Edwards and Kidde commercial fire and life safety solutions across multiple countries.

The Brand Sales professional acts as the primary regional interface with global sales, product management, engineering, operations, and key customers, translating market requirements into compliant, commercially viable solutions that drive growth, customer satisfaction, and long-term market adoption.

The individual will partner with sales executives across the region to develop and promote strong product and application knowledge and apply it to channel partners, A&E firms, integrators, and end-user customers, with the intent to drive specifications and brand awareness.

The Brand Sales professional will be evaluated based on the overall growth and success of the region.

Key Responsibilities

Weekly 


 Support the regional sales team with customer service issues, demand planning, and forecasting.
 Execute key global accounts within the region by facilitating customer contact, account pipeline management, and project status updates.
 Call on engineering firms to support the sales team with key product presentations and end-user pitches.
 Facilitate training events in collaboration with training teams, customers, and sales teams.
 Represent the region at key association meetings.
 Travel as necessary to support customers, conduct training, deliver presentations, and attend local trade shows.


Monthly 


 Contribute to planning events, trade shows, calendar updates, and travel schedules.
 Submit expense reports at least twice per month.
 Monitor progress on special regional and company-assigned projects.
 Maintain updates on current products and promotions.
 Visit integrators to gather market intelligence and channel partner feedback.


Quarterly 


 Support quarterly forecast outlooks and updates.
 Stay current on required quarterly online ethics training and certifications.


Travel Requirements


 Ability to travel up to 60% of the time.


Basic Qualifications


 Bachelor’s Degree preferred.
 Experience selling within the Fire Alarm, Security, or Technical Industry.
 Mandatory fluency in both spoken and written English and Spanish.
 Portuguese language skills preferred (not mandatory)


Preferred Qualifications


 Excellent written and verbal presentation and communication skills.
 Basic computer skills.
 High energy level, with strong product and code knowledge and application expertise.
 Strong interpersonal skills are essential.


World Leaders in Fire and Life Safety

Kidde Global Solutions is a world leader in fire & life safety solutions tailored for complex commercial facilities to homes. Through iconic, industry-defining brands including Kidde, Kidde Commercial, Edwards, GST, Badger, Gloria and Aritech, we provide residential and commercial customers with advanced solutions and services to protect people and property in a wide range of applications, all around the globe.

title: Analista de RRSS
description:
About the job

🚀 Analista de RRSS & Social Listening (con pasión por la IA y el marketing digital)

¿Eres de las personas que detectan una tendencia antes de que se vuelva viral? ¿Te emociona descubrir nuevas herramientas de IA, automatizar procesos y convertir datos en insights accionables? Entonces esta oportunidad puede ser para ti.

🎯 ¿Qué harás?

Serás parte del equipo de Marketing impulsando la innovación, el análisis digital y la eficiencia operativa mediante herramientas de Inteligencia Artificial y Social Listening.

Tus Principales Retos Serán

🔍 Monitorear conversaciones digitales, tendencias y percepción de marca a través de actividades de Social Listening.

📈 Analizar información de campañas digitales y transformar datos de Excel o Google Sheets en reportes, dashboards y resúmenes ejecutivos.

🤖 Identificar tareas repetitivas dentro del equipo y desarrollar soluciones de automatización utilizando herramientas no-code, IA y LLMs.

✍️ Configurar asistentes y agentes internos que faciliten la creación de copies, briefs, benchmarks y materiales de marketing.

🎨 Explorar e implementar herramientas de IA creativa como Midjourney, Higgsfield, Seedance, Spaces y otras plataformas emergentes para apoyar la producción visual.

📚 Documentar procesos, automatizaciones y mejores prácticas para facilitar la adopción y transferencia de conocimiento dentro del equipo.

💡 Proponer constantemente nuevas formas de optimizar procesos, generar eficiencia y potenciar los resultados del área.

🧠 Lo que buscamos

Requisitos Indispensables

✅ Licenciatura en Marketing, Comunicación, Publicidad, Mercadotecnia Digital o afín.

✅ Inglés intermedio (capacidad para consultar herramientas, documentación y tendencias en inglés).

✅ Conocimiento de redes sociales, métricas digitales y tendencias de consumo digital.

✅ Manejo de Excel y/o Google Sheets.s.

🎁 Lo que ofrecemos

💰 Bono anual.

🏦 Caja de ahorro.

🛍️ Descuento en tienda.

🌴 Días de vacaciones superiores a los establecidos por ley.

🚀 Un entorno donde tus ideas y experimentos sí pueden convertirse en proyectos reales.

🌟 ¿Por qué esta vacante es diferente?

Porque no buscamos a alguien que solo monitoree redes sociales. Buscamos a una persona curiosa, analítica y creativa que quiera combinar marketing, tecnología, datos e inteligencia artificial para construir la forma en que trabajará el marketing del futuro.

Si te emociona descubrir tendencias, automatizar procesos y experimentar con las herramientas más innovadoras del mercado, queremos conocerte. ✨

description:
About the job

Canonical is a leading provider of open source software and operating systems to the global enterprise and technology markets. Our platform, Ubuntu, is very widely used in breakthrough enterprise initiatives such as public cloud, data science, AI, engineering innovation, and IoT. Our customers include the world's leading public cloud and silicon providers, and industry leaders in many sectors. The company is a pioneer of global distributed collaboration, with 1200+ colleagues in 75+ countries and very few office-based roles. Teams meet two to four times yearly in person, in interesting locations around the world, to align on strategy and execution.

The company is founder-led, profitable, and growing.

Open Role: Marketing Associate 

Marketers at Canonical are brand stewards and demand creators.They transform complex open-source technology into messages, stories and strategies that shape the market understanding of our vision. Some focus on differentiated product and portfolio positioning; others specialize in account-based engagement, partner and alliance messaging, or product-led growth. Whatever their specialization, each marketer works as part of a cross-functional unit, contributing campaigns and insights that help the company learn and grow faster.

We have a bias for action, focus efforts on the most impactful activities and take ownership of our results. We work across long buying cycles, balance storytelling with data, design experiments, track outcomes, and iterate rapidly to find what works.

Marketers at Canonical don’t just promote open source; they amplify it, ensuring our innovations reach the right people, at the right time, with clarity and purpose from developers to decision makers.

As a Marketing Associate , you won't just be watching from the sidelines; you will be hands-on from day one, collaborating with cross-functional teams to translate complex technical innovations into compelling market value.

Location: This role will be based remote globally

What Your Day Will Look Like


GTM Support: Contribute to go-to-market planning and execution. 
Storytelling: Draft and edit compelling messaging and positioning that highlights business value for diverse target audiences. 
Campaign Coordination: Assist in developing campaign plans and content dissemination strategies to ensure our message reaches the right people. 
Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with other demand generation and digital teams to help optimize marketing funnels and track campaign performance. 
Event & Social Support: Work with the wider marketing team to coordinate webinars, events, and social media promotions. 



What We Are Looking For In You


Tech Curiosity: A genuine passion for technology and a desire to learn about open source. 
Analytical Thinking: An ability to break down complex issues and translate them into clear, actionable recommendations. 
Collaboration: Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to build relationships within a fast-paced, cross-functional environment. 
Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills; you enjoy storytelling and creating impactful content. 
Proactive Mindset: A self-starter who can prioritize tasks effectively and meet deadlines in a dynamic setting. 
Foundational Knowledge: A basic understanding of marketing principles or go-to-market strategies (via your degree, internships, or personal projects). 
Growth Mindset: Someone who is eager to learn, open to feedback, and not afraid to take on new challenges. 



What We Offer You

Your base pay will depend on various factors including your geographical location, level of experience, knowledge and skills. In addition to the benefits above, certain roles are also eligible for additional benefits and rewards including annual bonuses and sales incentives based on revenue or utilisation. Our compensation philosophy is to ensure equity right across our global workforce.

In addition to a competitive base pay, we provide all team members with additional benefits, which reflect our values and ideals. Please note that additional benefits may apply depending on the work location and, for more information on these, please ask your Talent Partner.


Fully remote working environment - we’ve been working remotely since 2004!
Personal learning and development budget of 2,000USD per annum
Annual compensation review
Recognition rewards
Annual holiday leave
Parental Leave
Employee Assistance Programme
Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues at ‘sprints’
Priority Pass for travel and travel upgrades for long haul company events



About Canonical

Canonical is a pioneering tech firm that is at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open source projects and the platform for AI, IoT and the cloud, we are changing the world on a daily basis. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence - in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do.

Canonical has been a remote-first company since its inception in 2004. Work at Canonical is a step into the future, and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game. Canonical provides a unique window into the world of 21st-century digital business.

Canonical is an equal opportunity employer

We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.
